query_title: A Night of Horror: Nightmare Radio

recommendations.title: The 100 Candles Game
recommendations.overview: A group of friends must confront their fears in a terrifying game. They must sit by the other players in a circle made of a hundred candles, take one of them and tell a horror story. As stories are told and candles blown out, strange events will star
recommendations.director: Nicholas Peterson, Guillermo Lockhart, Oliver Lee Garland, Nicolás Onetti, Daniel Rübesam, Victor Català, Christopher West, Brian Deane

recommendations.title: What the Waters Left Behind

recommendations.title: Isolation
recommendations.overview: On a remote Irish farm, five people become unwilling participants in an experiment that goes nightmarishly wrong.

recommendations.title: Elena Undone
recommendations.overview: The wife of a pastor who preaches against homosexuality embarks on an affair with a female writer.

recommendations.title: I Am Not a Serial Killer
recommendations.overview: In a small Midwestern town, a troubled teen with homicidal tendencies must hunt down and destroy a supernatural killer while keeping his own inner demons at bay.

recommendations.title: Ghosthouse
recommendations.overview: A group of unlikely companions receive a radio call leading to a deserted house with a grisly past.

recommendations.title: Keeping Mum
recommendations.overview: A pastor preoccupied with writing the perfect sermon fails to realize that his wife is having an affair and his children are up to no good.

recommendations.title: Winter Light
recommendations.overview: A Swedish pastor fails a loving woman, a suicidal fisherman and God.

recommendations.title: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A man's life is turned inside out after a visit from his college friend leads him into the unexpected.

recommendations.title: From the Dark
recommendations.overview: A couple on a trip through the Irish countryside find themselves hunted by a creature who only attacks at night.
